subject: task
body:

#72 Jack climb/rope/hang + weapon overlay — https://github.com/yonidavidson/quarry/issues/72
#73 Readability/silhouette/feet pass — https://github.com/yonidavidson/quarry/issues/73

Read AGENTS.md. ACK with issue number + first step. register --status 'working #N …'.
QA lead: yonidavidson-0f43 (can review screenshots).
